open_handoffs.message: Commit 03 wires format_history() into chain.py generator. When you replace chain.py in Commit 10, carry this forward: call SessionMemory.format_history(session_id) before graph.invoke() and pass it into AgentState as conversation_history. This is a named deliverable of Commit 10, not optional.

claude_decisions.decision: Monitoring stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) stays in prod compose
claude_decisions.reason: Team Lead: portfolio must demonstrate production-grade self-evaluation and metrics visibility

claude_decisions.decision: AgentState designed for full arc in Commit 07
claude_decisions.reason: Nova flagged: retroactive state schema changes cascade through compiled LangGraph graph — design once for commits 07-17
Nova: consistent with existing chain.py pattern. Async graph would require rewriting all synchronous node I/O.

claude_decisions.decision: Cache key incorporates user_level from Commit 17 onward
claude_decisions.reason: Nova: query-level cache shared across users at different mastery levels causes silent correctness bugs
